heading: Omitted
label: 1779d Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to establishment and management of a separate tribal trust fund for each of the Indian Nations, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 107–331, title VI, § 606116 Stat. 2851Dec. 13, 2002
